tips_en: Start with Paper 1, as its framework for disciplined, verifiable use of noisy world-model rollouts addresses a foundational bottleneck in future-oriented visual reasoning. Papers 2 and 3 complement it through parallel themes of scaled distillation and structured verification—Paper 2 in embodied control via expert distillation, and Paper 3 in iterative, critic-guided figure generation.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读论文1，它针对多模态大模型如何可靠调用与验证噪声世界模型仿真这一核心问题提出了PF-OPSD框架。论文2和3分别将类似的蒸馏与验证思想延伸至具身智能控制（规模化专家蒸馏）和科学图表生成（多智能体验证-修正），三者在“训练规模化+结构化验证”的方法论上形成了有趣的呼应。
